context: Evaluates whether the agent implements per-user rate limiting using a rule with a `default` fallback value (e.g. `default user_limit := 10`) rather than hardcoding the fallback in conditionals.

checklist.name: Default rule value for fallback limit
checklist.description: The policy declares a default fallback limit using `default <rule_name> := <value>` (e.g. `default user_limit := 10`) — the same pattern as `default allow := false`, not using `else :=` or `object.get`

checklist.name: Per-tier limit lookup
checklist.description: The policy defines separate rule heads (or conditions) that return tier-specific limits (e.g. 1000 for premium, 100 for standard) by reading from `data.user_tiers`

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
